channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken pipe and placed on the side of the building, 22nd July
item.description:
A huge piece of piping has been dislodged and placed on the side of the building. This is not safe as we have young children on the estate who could come into contact with this causing serious harm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal Signpost knocked over blocking pathway for residents, 22nd July
item.description:
On Monday 20th July this sign post was knocked over causing severe obstruction on the pathway that the residents walk through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motor bike left by garages that is being stripped, 22nd July
item.description:
Stripped motorbike by entrance to the garage on Barson Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barson Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Blind, 22nd July
item.description:
Broken blind dumped behind green electrical cabinet near road sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hengist Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Misaligned drain grate, 22nd July
item.description:
Misaligned stormwater drain grate I would like to report a stormwater drain grate that appears to be damaged/misaligned. There is a gap between the grate sections, which may create a trip hazard especially in front of the communal entrance please replace

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox carcass on street near Crystal Palace surgery, 22nd July
item.description:
Already In decomposition as of Tuesday 21/07
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for Deep Cleaning of the Staircase and Hallway 1-8, 22nd July
item.description:
Something sticky and foul-smelling seems to have been spilled throughout the hallway and staircase. Could you please arrange for a proper deep clean of the whole communal areas 1-8? Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Approximately 10:50pm this evening 21/7/26 a bed/mattress/frame was dumped on the estate 1-10 Courtauld House by fly tippers. If you can check the CCTV cameras you will see transporting the items and drove off. This is a well known dumping spot happening
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pritchards Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown plum tree and fruit falling everyday. It is a slipping hazard and a pest attraction, 21st July
item.description:
Her tree is overgrown and she does not maintain the fruit falling onto the public street. Its like that every year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maynard Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sand spilled on road and pavement. Paint spilled on road, 21st July
item.description:
Building material and paint spilt on pavement and road. This is becoming more and more a frequent occurrence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding problem Shawbury road, 21st July
item.description:
Weeds are sprouting all over the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Shawbury Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Bag of Empty Nitrous Oxide Canisters Dumped on Path, 21st July
item.description:
A large bag of empty nitrous oxide canisters has been left dumped on the path by number 03. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic control stuck on red, 21st July
item.description:
There's a temporary traffic control on the junction of Kipling Street and Long Lane. It's stuck on red for all approaches at the time of writing, and traffic is having to run reds to proceed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 142-150, Long Lane, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White paint all over roads and pavements from large paint tub which we assume broke open., 21st July
item.description:
Tonight 21st we went for an evening walk and noticed white paint all over the road and pavement on left hand side of the intersection of London lane and Kinnaird avenue. Clearly someone had a very serious acciden and then managed to make the spillage worse by walking a leaking tub of paint all over the road and pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Palettes and building materials dumped from council flat reno, 21st July
item.description:
Dirty palettes outside the front of linslade house dumped from building workers still outside the front of linslade house. Please remove it looks unsightly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste Timber Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A pile of waste timber has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Metal Cabinet Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
An unwanted metal cabinet has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 24. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Bag of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A large bag of rubbish has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 20. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattress and Foam Dumped Under Tree, 21st July
item.description:
A large mattress and foam has been left dumped under the tree opposite number 16. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Car Body Part Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A broken car body part has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
